'''Rune Mysteries''' is a novice level [[Free-to-play]] [[quest]], and a requirement for mining [[rune essence]] within the [[Rune essence mine]] or using [[lamps]] and [[book of knowledge|books]] on [[runecraft]].

==Details==
{{Quest details
|description = After the first [[Wizards' Tower]] burned down a hundred years ago, the incantation allowing teleportation to the [[rune essence mine]] was lost. However, after much research from the [[Order of Wizards]], the incantation is on the verge of rediscovery...
|start = Speak to [[Duke Horacio]] on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of [[Lumbridge Castle]].
|startmap = 3210,3222,plane:1
|difficulty = Novice
|length = Short
|requirements = 
|items = None
|recommended = *Fast travel to several locations
**[[Lumbridge]] to start the quest - [[Lumbridge Teleport]] or [[Lumbridge Home Teleport]]
**[[Varrock]] (1 trip) - [[Varrock teleport]] or [[Chronicle]] or [[Skills necklace]] to [[Cooks' Guild]] ''([[Members only]])'' or [[Ring of wealth]] to [[Grand Exchange]] ''(Members only)''
**[[Wizard's Tower]] (2 trips) - [[Necklace of passage]] or [[Amulet of the eye]] or [[Amulet of glory]] to [[Draynor Village]] ''(All Members only)''
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Varlamore}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
[[File:Duke Horacio chathead.png|left]]
Talk to [[Duke Horacio]] on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of [[Lumbridge Castle]], and ask if he has any quests to give out. He will explain that although he himself has no tasks for the player, he did find a strange talisman. Curious about its origin, he will give you an [[air talisman]] and ask you to bring it to the arch mage of the [[Wizards' Tower]].

:'''Tip''': Multiple [[Air talisman|air talismans]] can be obtained by using the [[drop trick]] at [[Duke Horacio]]. This may be useful for early runecraft training methods. For details, see [[Money making guide/Collecting air talismans|this guide]].''

Go to the Wizards' Tower found south of [[Draynor Village]], and descend the ladder into the basement to talk to [[Archmage Sedridor]]. He will take your air talisman and give you a [[research package]] to deliver to [[Aubury]] in [[Varrock]].

Aubury is located south of [[Varrock east bank|Varrock's east bank]], inside of [[Aubury's Rune Shop|his rune shop]]. Talk to Aubury, and he will give you some [[Notes (Rune Mysteries)|notes]] to deliver back to Wizard Sedridor. He will also offer the player a cup of tea, which will completely restore [[energy|run energy]] if accepted.

Make your way back to the [[Wizards' Tower]], and talk to [[Archmage Sedridor]] once more. He will give you back your air talisman and explain the basics of [[Runecraft]].

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Rune Mysteries
|image = [[File:Rune Mysteries reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards =
*The ability to mine [[rune essence]]
*An [[air talisman]]
*The ability to use [[lamp]]s and [[Book of Knowledge|books of knowledge]] from [[random events]] on [[Runecraft]]
*Completing this quest awards the player with 5 [[Kudos]] which can be claimed by talking to [[Historian Minas]] in the [[Varrock Museum]].
}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of Rune Mysteries is required for the following:
*[[Enter the Abyss]]
*[[Lunar Diplomacy]]
*[[One Small Favour]]
*[[The Lost Tribe]]
*[[What Lies Below]]
*[[Easy Ardougne Diary]] - ''Have Wizard Cromperty teleport you to the Rune essence mine.''
*[[Easy Lumbridge & Draynor Diary]] - ''Have Archmage Sedridor teleport you to the Rune essence mine.''
*[[Easy Varrock Diary]] - ''Have Aubury teleport you to the Essence mine.''
